Previous page Kills flying insects, including hornets Kills flying insects including wasps and hornets. Safe to use indoors or outdoors. Odour-free Odour-free formula. Plant based active ingredient (also contains synthetic active ingredient). Precision spray tool Features a precision spray tool for treating wasps and hornets in joints or cracks. Next page 1 Kills Flying Insects 2 Odour-Free 3 Precision Spray Fast and effective, for immediate results FlyClear Wasp & Hornet Killer effectively kills flying insects such as wasps and hornets with immediate effect. The product is odour-free and quickly deals with flying insects in ways that are kinder to nature and includes a precision tool ideal for corners and cracks. FlyClear Wasp & Hornet Killer is made from a plant based active ingredient exclusively developed by the scientists at Evergreen Garden Care and is certified for use in organic systems. Both the bottle and cap are 100% recyclable. Why should I use FlyClear Wasp & Hornet Killer? FlyClear Wasp & Hornet Killer is an aerosol spray, effective against flying insects such as wasps, hornets and flies in and around premises. It contains chrysanthemum flower extract as an active ingredient. Spray head is ideal to access cracks. Where can I use FlyClear Wasp & Hornet Killer? FlyClear Wasp & Hornet Killer can be used indoors and outdoors. When should I use FlyClear Wasp & Hornet Killer? FlyClear Wasp & Hornet Killer can be used all year round, when flying insects are present. How do I use FlyClear Wasp & Hornet Killer? Shake can well before use. Hold the can upright. Point the spray nozzle away from face and press the button. Spray directly at insects for 1 second. Do not exceed 5 seconds in 20m² room. Ventilate room thoroughly before re-entry.
